drivetrain.reasoning: R1: Swerve mandatory. Fast cycles between source and speaker/amp. MK4i L2 for balance of speed and pushing.

intake.reasoning: R5: 14" foam ring is large and light — under-bumper ground intake with flex wheels. Full-width for maximum capture zone. No deploy needed for under-bumper.

scorer.reasoning: R4+R6: Speaker at 6'6" with angled opening — flywheel shooter is ideal. Notes are light (0.44 lb) so dual flywheel with backspin. Amp is low scoring and capped. R19: Speaker is UNCAPPED and primary differentiator. Amp is SEMI-CAPPED (max 2 notes stored, 5 pts per amplified cycle).

endgame.reasoning: R8: Stage chain at ~5' height. Climb for 3 pts (single), 8 pts (harmony with 2), 10 pts (3-robot). Winch climber to hook on chain. R19: Stage is SEMI-CAPPED but Harmony bonus makes it high value.

autonomous.reasoning: R7: Auto scoring same as teleop (2 pts/speaker). R18: 3-note auto from starting position + 2 centerline notes. Preload + 2 floor pickups.

scoring_analysis.reasoning: R19: Speaker is fully uncapped and primary differentiator. Amplification doubles+ value. Amp is semi-capped feeder mechanism. Stage is worth doing but secondary.
